title: Visual SLAM for Underwater Robots
desc: Visual and visual-inertial SLAM using ORB-SLAM3.
details: Used VAROS dataset to evaluate the performance of ORB-SLAM3 in underwater domain. The ORB extraction parameters have been optimized for underwater images as well as the effect of several image enhancement techniques on ORBSLAM3 has been evaluated

title: DSAC* with Homography Loss
details: Reimplementation of DSAC* for visual re-localization, aiming to determine camera pose from single images of a scene. Explored the effectiveness of a Homography-based loss function in training DSAC* for this task.

title: Dynamic Positioning System
details: Designed PID control system along with Extended Kalman Filter based observer for station keeping and setpoint following under environmental disturbances.

title: Solar Panel Micro-crack Detection
details: Transfer Learning and Ensemble technique used to train multiple CNN models for detecting micro cracks in solar PV panels from Electro-luminescence images.

title: Real-time cabbage detection, counting and accurate mapping into geo location from drone video footage for precision agriculture.
desc: Detecting Cabbage from drone footage and track and map them in world map for precision farming.
details: From readily available DJI drone footage, the model detects and counts cabbage present in a field. It also maps the cabbages into world map coordinates.
